name: Factor Momentum (MOM of MOM)
description: Applies the momentum principle to factors themselves rather than individual securities. If the Value factor has been outperforming recently, overweight Value in your portfolio. If Momentum factor has been lagging, underweight it. This 'meta' approach capitalizes on persistence in factor returns.
core_logic: factor_score(f,t) = return(factor_f, t-63, t). Overweight factors with positive recent return, underweight those with negative. Rebalance monthly. Equivalent to time-series momentum applied to factor ETF returns.

sharpe_ratio.note: incremental Sharpe improvement over static factor blend

risk.main_risk: Trend reversals in factor performance; factor overcrowding

pros: Simple to implement using factor ETFs
Captures persistence documented in academic literature
cons: Limited capacity as more investors adopt it
Adds modest alpha over static blend
signal_buy: All 3 momentum windows (21/63/126d) positive → full allocation to this factor
signal_sell: All 3 momentum windows negative → reduce/eliminate factor allocation
